examples: It is locally convex in the sense that it has no loops and the curvature never changes sign.
The hyperbolic surface, which has so-called negative curvature because its surface curves up and down at the same time, like a saddle.
Curvature of the surface prevents slump block from becoming completely detached.
Gravity was not a physical force but was caused by a curvature in space-time.
Edith suffered from curvature of the spine and was forced to wear a heavy metal cage.
